result.stdout:
Description:
  GitOps Automation

Usage:
  goa [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  gen   Generate GitOps Files
  eval  Evaluate an expression
  list  List Data

commands.payload:
Description:
  GitOps Automation

Usage:
  goa [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  gen   Generate GitOps Files
  eval  Evaluate an expression
  list  List Data

result.stdout:
Description:
  Evaluate an expression

Usage:
  goa eval [options]

Options:
  -e, --expression <expression> (REQUIRED)  Expression to evaluate
  -?, -h, --help                            Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:

Options:
  -e, --expression <expression> (REQUIRED)  Expression to evaluate
  -?, -h, --help                            Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate GitOps Files

Usage:
  goa gen [options]

Options:
  -c, --config-path <config-path>      Config path [default: ./config]
  -p, --clusters-path <clusters-path>  Clusters path [default: ./clusters]
  -v, --verbose                        Verbose logging
  -y, --dry-run                        Dry Run of options
  -?, -h, --help                       Show help and usage information

  clusters  List Clusters
  groups    List Groups

result.stdout:
Description:
  List Applications

Usage:
  goa list apps [options]

Options:
  -c, --config-path <config-path>  Config path [default: ./config]
  -v, --verbose                    Verbose logging
  --yaml                           Format as yaml
  -?, -h, --help                   Show help and usage information
